query: Can you help me devise a 5-day travel plan starting from Cedar Rapids and covering 2 cities in Colorado from March 23rd to March 27th, 2022? This journey is for one person with a budget of $4,300.

plan.transportation: F3840884, from Cedar Rapids to Denver, 1 hours 58 minutes
plan.accommodation: *NO GUEST SERVICE FEE* Luxury Studio Suite w/ Free Continental Breakfast, Denver

plan.breakfast: TBH - The Big House Cafe, Denver
plan.attraction: Denver Zoo;Denver Botanic Gardens;Denver Art Museum;
plan.lunch: The Fatty Bao - Asian Gastro Bar, Denver
plan.accommodation: *NO GUEST SERVICE FEE* Luxury Studio Suite w/ Free Continental Breakfast, Denver
